articles.title: Cardano ($ADA) Could Be ‘Severely Undervalued’ According to on-Chain Data
articles.description: The price of smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) could be “severely undervalued,” as on-chain analysis suggests there is a bullish outlook for the cryptocurrency that could see its price rise.
